plugins.name: Developer Role Normalizer
plugins.description: Converts developer message roles to system for OpenAI-compatible providers (e.g. DeepSeek) that do not recognize the developer role.
plugins.author: xinghaix

plugins.name: CPA Manager Plus
plugins.description: Embeds Manager Plus dashboard, usage, monitoring, and inspection in CPA via reverse proxy to Manager Server (host.http.do).
plugins.author: xinghaix
